---
title: "About Me & Full Experience"
---

# About Me

I'm Hana Chen, a results-driven professional with a passion for leveraging data and strategic thinking to drive business growth. With experience spanning digital marketing, data analysis, and business innovation, I combine analytical rigor with creative problem-solving.

Currently based in Boston, MA, I'm pursuing dual graduate degrees to deepen my expertise in applied business analytics and business administration.

---

## 📚 Education

### Master of Applied Business Analytics
**Boston University** | Sep 2025 – Present

### Master of Business Administration
**National Taipei University** | Sep 2023 – Present  
GPA: 4.3/4.3

### Bachelor of International Business and Trade
**Soochow University** | Sep 2018 – Jun 2022  
GPA: 4.3/4.3

### Exchange Program
**Rennes School of Business, France** | Sep 2021 – Feb 2022

---

## 💼 Work Experience

### Impact Learning Intern
**YouthBuild Global** | Boston, MA | Jan 2026 – May 2026

- Evaluated 2025 annual survey data using Excel to create detailed charts and perform quantitative analyses
- Identified key trends and actionable insights that enhanced program evaluation reports
- Developed clear and impactful data visualizations to support decision-making
- Extracted actionable insights from complex datasets to improve program effectiveness

### Digital Marketing Intern
**Gamesofa Inc.** | Taipei, Taiwan | Jul 2024 – Jun 2025

- Created marketing content and managed two social media channels (Facebook, Instagram)
- **Grew followers from 0 to 9,000 within 9 months**
- Analyzed backend data and generated monthly performance reports on key metrics
- Received Certificate of Appreciation in Business Category at 2025 Taiwan Original X Award for "CatCafe" project

---

## 🚀 Project Experience

### Brewery Marketing & Business Strategy Project
**Boston University** | Sep 2025 – Dec 2025

- Developed comprehensive marketing strategy and business plan for brewery launch in Boston
- Conducted internal and external analyses to determine positioning
- Designed sustainable promotional campaigns with cost estimation and operational planning

### Delivery Time Analysis for Food Delivery Platforms
**Boston University** | Sep 2025 – Dec 2025

- Used SQL to analyze and visualize delivery time factors
- Produced reports combining technical analysis with practical business insights
- Collaborated effectively within cross-functional team

### Generative AI Food Waste Reduction App Prototype
**National Taipei University** | Mar 2025 – May 2025

- Co-developed mobile app prototype using generative AI and CursorAI platform
- Designed user-friendly interface to enhance usability and engagement
- Applied course concepts to solve real-world sustainability challenges

### Anti-Cyberbullying Solution Design
**FlyTech Foundation** | Jul 2023 – Aug 2024

- Led team applying design thinking and user persona development
- Participated in prototyping and testing process
- Presented at exhibition attended by 100+ participants
- **Won Popularity Award**

### OTOP Marketing Competition
**Ministry of Economic Affairs, R.O.C.** | Mar 2023 – Oct 2023

- Led team in developing marketing strategy and competitive analysis
- Conducted market research to refine campaign approach
- **Achieved Bronze Award** for innovative branding and storytelling

---

## 🎓 Certificates & Skills

### Languages
- English (Proficient, Duolingo 120)
- Mandarin (Native)

### Professional Certifications
- Sololearn – Python Developer
- Sololearn – Introduction to SQL
- NVIDIA – Building RAG Agents with LLMs
- NVIDIA – Efficient Large Language Model Customization
- NVIDIA – Generative AI with Diffusion Models

### Technical Skills

**Data Analysis & Visualization:** Excel | PowerPoint | Canva

**Programming:** Python | SQL | HTML & CSS

---

## 📞 Get in Touch

📧 Email: [hhanaz0903@gmail.com](mailto:hhanaz0903@gmail.com)

📱 Phone: 857-540-9193

📍 Location: Boston, MA
